## Description

Ferocious is a name that arrives before the ship does. No two witnesses describe the same face, and the wanted-bills of {{house-veldrane}} carry four different sketches. What is certain: three Veldrane powder-barges have burned to the waterline, and each time a black flag was seen leaving.

## Recent History

After the last raid Ferocious vanished into the reef-mazes of {{the-shattered-reach}}. Some say the captain drowned; others that {{the-drowned-court}} took them in. No body, no ship, no proof.

## Relationships

- Hunted by {{captain-powderkeg}}.
- Keeps a room in {{kells-hollow}}, or did.
